## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run command `...`
2. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

## Environment
- **Bot version:** (e.g. 2.0.0)
- **Node version:** (e.g. 22.x)
- **OS:** (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04)
